summary: The source contract fixes every coordinate to the 51 by 51 grid and limits the scalable tower list to 50 entries, so a runtime trend cannot honestly separate algorithms across a larger spatial domain.

workload_bound.unit: network towers over at most 2601 integral candidate coordinates
workload_bound.source_constraint: towers contains 1 through 50 entries and every x and y coordinate is between 0 and 50

replacement_checks.evidence: The reference evaluates at most 51 squared times 50, or 130050, tower-coordinate contributions while storing only scalar state.

Regression compares the bounding-box implementation with an independent exhaustive 51 by 51 oracle across deterministic random fixtures and explicit zero-quality, radius-boundary, tie, overlap, and coordinate-boundary cases.
